ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY FOUNDATION GRANT APPLICATIONS ARE BY INVITATION ONLY. THE FOUNDATION IS CURRENTLY UPDATING THE APPLICATION PROCESS AND TIMELINE. PLEASE SEE THEIR WEBSITE FOR THE LATEST DETAILS.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.SubmissionDeadlinesTxt: THERE ARE NO DEADLINES FOR APPLICATIONS
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: GRANTS ARE ONLY CONSIDERED FOR 501(C) 3 OR EDUCATIONAL ENTITIES THAT PROVIDE SERVICES IN THE OKLAHOMA CITY AREA.
